description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that installs openssh-client if missing, starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIV_KEY, creates ~/.ssh and disables strict host key checking. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage, add a test_coverage job that runs npm install, npm install --global mocha nyc, and npm run coverage. In the deploy stage, add a deploy_prod job that runs only on the master branch, sets the production environment at https://leviolson.com, echoes a deployment message, runs npm install, and SSHes to root@68.183.173.226 to pull the latest code, reinstall dependencies, and restart the LeviOlson app with pm2 (stop, delete, start with --watch, then show the last two log lines).
